description: Unidentified document in Arabic script, perhaps a brief piece of correspondence. Dated 1243 AH (1827/1828 CE). The signature of ʿAlī ___[?] Agha Kapūdān Būlāq is present– which highlights the Nile port of Būlāq as the location where this document likely issued. Another name with the title Kapūdān appears in line 1. MCD,
description_he: מסמך לא מזוהה בכתב ערבי, אולי מכתב קצר; 1243 לאה (1827/28 לספירה); חתימת עלי [?] אע'א קפודאן בולאק (נמל הנילוס של קהיר)
